news.t: Commercial real-estate worries weigh down property ETFs — but a ‘durable' corner holds up relatively well

holdings.infoBox: JRE is an equity ETF with a total of 24 individual holdings. The top holdings are Welltower stock at 13.03%, Prologis at 12.20%, Equinix at 9.45%, Simon Property Group at 7.32%, and Digital Realty Trust at 6.66%.

overview.description: The Janus Henderson U.S. Real Estate ETF (JRE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of real-estate and real estate-related companies in the United States. JRE was launched on Jun 22, 2021 and is issued by Janus Henderson.

data.title: Commercial real-estate worries weigh down property ETFs — but a ‘durable' corner holds up relatively well
data.text: Hello! This week's ETF wrap looks at real estate funds with exposure to commercial properties, an area of the market under pressure as investors worry lending is tightening after this month's stress i...
